one_line: A small folder for moving things between websites.
for_humans: Open Claude in Chrome, paste this URL once, say 'save this here' on one site, 'read from the buffer' on another.
for_claude: Read /buffer/manifest.json. Pick the first folder with status 'open'. Use the folder name as Bearer. Write under /buffer/folders/<name>/. After save, also write files.json, latest.txt, latest.html, summary.txt, state.json. Always /commit then /promote.
